entities.name: TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a plant uses water for biomass production, often abbreviated as TE

entities.name: VAPOR PRESSURE DEFICIT
entities.description: The difference between the amount of moisture in the air and how much moisture the air can hold when saturated, abbreviated as VPD

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A C4 cereal crop studied for its high transpiration efficiency

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A C4 cereal crop studied for its transpiration efficiency

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A C4 cereal crop studied for its transpiration efficiency

entities.name: C4 CEREALS
entities.description: A group of plants that use the C4 carbon fixation pathway

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of selective improvement of crop traits over time

entities.name: CARBON FIXATION
entities.description: The process of converting inorganic carbon to organic compounds

entities.name: PLANTING DENSITIES
entities.description: The number of plants grown per unit area, acting as a selective pressure

entities.name: RADIATION USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a plant converts solar radiation into biomass, abbreviated as RUE

entities.name: DENSITY RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to maintain productivity under high planting densities

entities.name: SOURCE-SINK RELATIONSHIP
entities.description: The interaction between organs that produce photosynthates and those that consume or store them

entities.name: CARBON DEMAND
entities.description: The requirement for carbon by the plant's sink organs

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHETIC ACTIVITY
entities.description: The rate at which photosynthesis occurs in the plant

entities.name: SOILS
entities.description: The growth medium which can vary in hydraulic properties

entities.name: HYDRAULIC SOIL PROPERTIES
entities.description: Physical characteristics of soil that affect water movement and transpiration response

entities.name: GXEXM INTERACTIONS
entities.description: The interaction between genotype, environment, and management
